title: GG Mock 15 — Remote Sensing, GIS & Applied

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The least common multiple (LCM) of $6$ and $8$ is _____ .
questions.solution:
**Concept.** LCM is the product of all prime factors at highest powers.

**Working.** $6=2\cdot 3$, $8=2^3$; LCM $=2^3\cdot 3=24$.

**Answer.** $24$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Choose the correct comparative form: 'This seam is ____ than the one we mined last year.'
questions.solution:
**Concept.** One-syllable adjectives form the comparative with '-er', and 'than' signals a comparative (not superlative).

**Working.** 'Thick' becomes 'thicker'; 'more thicker' is a double comparative and 'thickest' is superlative.

**Answer.** thicker.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The bar chart shows annual sales (in units) for four years: $40, 60, 30, 80$. The highest annual sales figure is _____ units.

figure.caption: Bar chart of annual sales for 2018-2021: 40, 60, 30, 80 units.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 180' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><line x1='30' y1='160' x2='220' y2='160' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='1'/><rect x='40' y='100' width='28' height='60' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='80' y='70' width='28' height='90' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='120' y='115' width='28' height='45' fill='#6366f1'/><rect x='160' y='40' width='28' height='120' fill='#6366f1'/><text x='44' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2018</text><text x='84' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2019</text><text x='124' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2020</text><text x='164' y='173' font-size='9' fill='#94a3b8'>2021</text></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Read the tallest bar.

**Working.** The values are $40,60,30,80$; the maximum is $80$ (year 2021).

**Answer.** $80$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: How many rectangles (of all sizes) are there in a strip of three unit cells in a row (shown)?

figure.caption: A horizontal strip divided into three equal unit cells.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><rect x='15' y='20' width='150' height='40' fill='none' stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='65' y1='20' x2='65' y2='60' stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='115' y1='20' x2='115' y2='60' stroke='#334155' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Count rectangles spanning $1$, $2$ or $3$ cells.

**Working.** Single cells $=3$, pairs $=2$, the full strip $=1$; total $=3+2+1=6$.

**Answer.** $6$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A can complete a task in $10$ days and B in $15$ days. Working together, they complete it in _____ days.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Combined rate is the sum of individual rates.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{10}+\dfrac{1}{15}=\dfrac{3+2}{30}=\dfrac{5}{30}=\dfrac{1}{6}$, so $6$ days.

**Answer.** $6$ days.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A scientist who studies the origin, composition and structure of rocks is a ____.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Field names derive from their subject roots: 'petro-' means rock.

**Working.** A petrologist studies rocks; a cartographer makes maps, a meteorologist studies weather, and a hydrologist studies water.

**Answer.** petrologist.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Pipe A fills a tank in $6$ hours and pipe B in $12$ hours. With both open, the tank fills in _____ hours.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Add the filling rates.

**Working.** $\dfrac{1}{6}+\dfrac{1}{12}=\dfrac{2+1}{12}=\dfrac{3}{12}=\dfrac{1}{4}$, so $4$ hours.

**Answer.** $4$ hours.

questions.subject: Palaeontology
questions.stem: Of $80$ genera before a mass extinction, $30$ survived. The extinction percentage is _____ %.

questions.subject: Mineralogy & Crystallography
questions.stem: The silicate structural class with a Si:O ratio of 1:3 (single-chain) is the
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Single-chain inosilicates (pyroxenes) have Si:O = 1:3.

**Working.**
Pyroxenes.

**Answer.** Pyroxenes

questions.subject: Geochemistry & Isotope Geology
questions.stem: A basalt has initial $^{87}$Sr/$^{86}$Sr $=0.704$. Index its source (0 = mantle ≤0.7035, 1 = crustal >0.7035): _____.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Low initial ratios indicate a mantle source; high ratios indicate crustal contamination.

**Working.**
$$0.704\Rightarrow 1.$$

**Answer.** $1$

questions.subject: Structural Geology
questions.stem: A planar fault strikes $30^\circ$ and dips $45^\circ$. The plunge of the true-dip line (steepest line on the plane) is _____ degrees.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The true-dip line plunges at the dip angle, in the dip direction.

**Working.**
$$\text{plunge}=\text{dip}=45^\circ.$$

**Answer.** $45^\circ$
